MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD ON THE COURT'S DISCOVERY CALENDAR (ROOM 525) AT 9:00 A.M. ON NOVEMBER 22, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 525, AS TO THE NOV-22-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ACHILL BEG CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,740.00 AGAINST PLAINTIFF WILLIAM ALLAN ARE AWARDED TO DEFENDANT. RESPONSES TO THE DISCOVERY SHALL BE DUE WITHIN TWENTY (20) DAYS. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND EMAIL IT TO PRO TEM JUDGE ANDY SCHWARTZ. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDY SCHWARTZ; CLERKS: M. MACADANGDANG, V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (525/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Nov-22-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (Via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. ZUBIN KHOSRAVI,Esq. of KERN SEGAL AND MURRAY(tel:415-474-1900)for Defendant.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT ACHILL BEG CONSTRUCTION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents.

Matter not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions in the amount of $1,740.00 against Plaintiff William Allan are awarded to Defendant. Responses to the discovery shall be due within twenty (20) days.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and email it to Pro Tem Judge Andy Schwartz.

Judge Pro Tem: Andy Schwartz; Clerks: M. Macadangdang, V. Da Fonseca; not reported. (525/JPT)
